channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Favoritenstraße from crossing Landgutgasse to crossing Keplerplatz and Keplergasse
item.description: The repair and redesign work in the Favoritenstraße pedestrian zone will be carried out following the ongoing sealing work of Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG at … [Since 19.04.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The repair and redesign work in the Favoritenstraße pedestrian zone will be carried out following the ongoing sealing work of Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG at …
[Since 19.04.2026]

item.title: N62: construction works
item.description: Due to construction works in the area of the Wiedner Hauptstraße the line N62 is redirected. [Since 08.01.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works in the area of the Wiedner Hauptstraße the line N62 is redirected.
[Since 08.01.2026]

item.title: U2/U5: Bacherplatz from Arbeitergasse to Schwarzhorngasse
item.description: Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: Schultheßgasse from crossing Halirschgasse and Gräffergasse to crossing Dittersdorfgasse and Fercher
item.description: The pipe laying work (preparations for underground construction) is generally carried out during the day and when a residual runway at least 3.00 m wide is kept free. [Since 19.10.2025]
item.content:encoded:
The pipe laying work (preparations for underground construction) is generally carried out during the day and when a residual runway at least 3.00 m wide is kept free.
[Since 19.10.2025]

item.title: Hernals Hauptstraße from Redtenbachergasse and Schadinagasse to Julius-Meinl-Gasse
item.description: The pipe laying work (preparations for underground construction) will be carried out in the actual area of Hernals main road by day, night and sometimes also on weekends … [Since 19.10.2025]
item.content:encoded:
The pipe laying work (preparations for underground construction) will be carried out in the actual area of Hernals main road by day, night and sometimes also on weekends …
[Since 19.10.2025]

item.title: Linzer Straße from junction Hüttelbergstraße and Bergmillergasse to junction Wolfersberggasse
item.description: The stop of the affected bus lines at the Bujattigasse will be temporarily moved to the Wolfersberggasse ON 1. [19.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The stop of the affected bus lines at the Bujattigasse will be temporarily moved to the Wolfersberggasse ON 1.
[19.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]

item.title: 80A: construction works
item.description: The line 80A is diverted towards Neu Marx between Friedensgasse and Stadionbrücke via the Wittelsbachstraße, Erdberger Lände and Schlachthausgasse. [Since 10.11.2025]
item.content:encoded:
The line 80A is diverted towards Neu Marx between Friedensgasse and Stadionbrücke via the Wittelsbachstraße, Erdberger Lände and Schlachthausgasse.
[Since 10.11.2025]

item.title: Otto-Probst-Straße crossing Tesarekplatz
item.description: The public bus lines affected in the construction site area will be redirected accordingly. [04.05.2026 – 14.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The public bus lines affected in the construction site area will be redirected accordingly.
[04.05.2026 – 14.06.2026]
